name: Nmap
author: Security Assessment Dashboard
description: Network exploration and security auditing utility. Runs real scans built from reusable, data-driven Scan Profiles (see profiles/) -- the reference implementation for all future scanner plugins.

install_instructions.linux: Install via your package manager: `sudo apt install nmap` (Debian/Ubuntu/Kali), `sudo dnf install nmap` (Fedora/RHEL), or `sudo pacman -S nmap` (Arch). Official releases: https://nmap.org/download.html. See docs/LINUX_TOOL_INSTALLATION.md for details.
